---
name: request-policy-waiver
description: Capture an advisory record for a simulated policy exception request.
---

# Request policy waiver

Use this advisory interview to capture a proposed exception record. It does **not** select mandatory policy, grant a waiver, or author normative policy.

Ask for the policy ID and property ID, the affected typed facts, business
reason, scope, duration, mitigations, accountable owner, and evidence.

State that `CCA-001`, `SEC-014`, `DR-009`, and `FIN-006` sections
**Exceptions and waivers** grant no waiver. Direct the requester to submit the
record for simulated policy-owner review through a pull request; do not imply
approval or change any policy text.

For the authoritative demo wording, read the selected policy's
`Exceptions and waivers` section.
